footer.tagline: Octopus does not stack more AI features on top of each other. It organizes conversation, execution, knowledge, traceability, and governance into a system that can genuinely hold work.

signals.collaboration: Let AI participate in real work, not just answer prompts
signals.runtime: Keep runtime, approvals, and traceability inside one surface
signals.memory: Turn knowledge and experience into reusable memory

home.title: Human + AI Collaboration
home.description: Octopus helps AI move from answering questions to participating in work, connecting conversation, execution, knowledge, traceability, and governance in one system.

product.title: Product Capabilities
product.description: From Conversations and Agents to Knowledge, Trace, Automations, and Runtime, Octopus organizes a complete collaboration loop between people and AI.

scenarios.title: Scenarios
scenarios.description: Whether for individuals, teams, or organizations, Octopus uses one product logic to support execution, collaboration, memory, and governance.

about.title: About Octopus
about.description: Learn why Octopus starts from human + AI collaboration to build a calmer, more trustworthy, and more sustainable work system.

bookDemo.title: Book a Demo
bookDemo.description: Book an Octopus demo centered on your team's rhythm, governance requirements, and real operating scenarios.

hero.title: Bring AI into the work, not leave it in the toolbar.
hero.description: Octopus brings conversation, execution, knowledge, traceability, and automation into one work system. Individuals move faster, teams coordinate with more clarity, and organizations keep compounding what they learn.
hero.note: We believe the future of work is not a person asking on one side and AI answering on the other. It is both moving the task forward inside the same system, keeping context alive, and preserving decision traces.
hero.quote: You do not need another talking tool. You need a work system that can actually collaborate.

belief.title: The relationship between people and AI should be more than request and response.
belief.description: When AI really participates in work, it has to enter real context, carry continuous tasks, accept constraints, stay traceable, and leave outcomes behind as the next starting point. Octopus is designed to turn that relationship into something that can be organized, expanded, and used over time.

conversations.label: Conversations
conversations.description: Conversation is treated as the real entry point to work, not just a chat window.

knowledge.label: Knowledge
knowledge.description: Valuable experience stays available, referable, and reusable instead of disappearing into personal recall.

trace.label: Trace + Runtime
trace.description: Every step, blocker, and approval can be seen, traced, and explained.

narrative.title: From thinking to execution to retention, inside one system.
narrative.description: The Octopus site does not break the product into isolated features. It shows a flow: understand, move, and leave something behind that can be used again.

think.title: Think together
think.description: Move conversation beyond one-off prompts and into long-lived context that understands goals, constraints, and the next move.
bullets: Anchor dialogue inside project and workspace context
Keep knowledge, resources, roles, and current tasks visible together
Let people and AI continue a line of work instead of restarting every time

execute.title: Execute together
execute.description: Push work forward by connecting agents, tools, automations, and runtime capabilities instead of stopping at recommendations.
bullets: Let Agents, Tools, and Automations participate in real workflows
Bring runtime power into execution with clear boundaries and permissions
Make collaboration produce action, not only advice

retain.title: Retain together
retain.description: Let traceability, knowledge, and governance leave durable marks so today’s work becomes tomorrow’s starting point.
bullets: Keep execution trails, blockers, and decision context in Trace
Turn conversations and outputs into durable knowledge
Give the organization reusable memory instead of repeated trial and error

scenarios.title: The same Octopus can support different scales of work.
scenarios.description: We do not split individuals, teams, and organizations into three unrelated products. The same product logic expands naturally across scale.

interface.title: Real collaboration should be visible in the interface.
interface.description: That is why the site does not replace proof with abstraction. We show the actual workbench, knowledge, trace, and governance surfaces.

cta.title: If what you want is not another AI tool, but a more complete work system.
cta.description: From individual efficiency to team coordination to organizational memory, Octopus is built to be placed seriously inside real work.

hero.title: A product that ties collaboration, execution, memory, and governance together.
hero.description: Octopus brings together the layers human + AI collaboration actually needs: conversation, agents, knowledge, traceability, automation, and runtime configuration no longer live in isolation.

structure.title: Not more modules. A more complete loop.
structure.description: Each capability matters because it changes how people and AI enter work, move tasks forward, and leave reusable outcomes behind.

conversations.title: Conversation is a work entry point, not an isolated window.
conversations.description: Dialogue stays connected to projects and context so AI can continue understanding the task and the operating environment.
bullets: Tie conversations to projects, resources, and runtime context
Use dialogue as the start of an ongoing workflow, not a one-shot prompt
Keep discussion, action, and outcome in one continuous thread

agents.title: Agents enter the work system instead of floating outside of it.
agents.description: Octopus makes room for personal agents, team agents, and explicit task roles inside one visible product surface.
bullets: Organize agents by role, capability, and responsibility
Make agent relationships visible inside team collaboration
Keep usage state, role boundaries, and activity inside the system

knowledge.title: Turn experience into something the organization can keep using.
knowledge.description: What matters in a conversation should not disappear with the moment. It should become the starting point for the next round of work.
bullets: Promote runtime findings, resources, and conclusions into knowledge
Preserve boundaries between project memory and shared memory
Support future retrieval, reuse, and contextual understanding

trace.title: Keep the execution path visible, not only the result.
trace.description: Trace keeps runtime state, blockers, approvals, and next actions legible and explainable.
bullets: Preserve key steps, blockers, and approval states in one timeline
Keep AI usage understandable as scope expands
Make retrospectives less dependent on personal memory

automations.title: Let recurring collaboration keep running, instead of restarting by hand.
automations.description: Octopus treats automation as an extension of collaboration so the system can continue moving work forward over time.
bullets: Support recurring operational rhythms inside the same system
Keep automation inside the same product and governance surface
Avoid fragmenting key work across external tools

runtime.title: Real AI execution needs runtime boundaries.
runtime.description: Permissions, models, tools, and runtime configuration define how AI enters real work instead of staying abstract.
bullets: Align runtime configuration with actual surface behavior
Give execution power clear organizational edges
Provide stable foundations for different scopes of collaboration

cta.title: Want to see how these capabilities show up together in real work.
cta.description: The value of Octopus does not live in any single module. It lives in how those capabilities form a more complete work system.
cta.secondary: Why We Designed It This Way

hero.title: The same system, adapted to different scales of work.
hero.description: Octopus does not push individual users away, and it does not flatten team or organizational needs into a personal productivity tool. It lets the same product logic unfold across scale.

matrix.title: Start with one person. Grow into a team and an organization.
matrix.description: The goal is not to separate audiences, but to give each scale the right level of collaboration density, memory, and governance.

individual.title: Individuals
individual.description: For people who need to move work forward continuously, keep context alive, and build personal working memory.
bullets: Move from scattered prompting to continuous collaboration
Keep conversations, resources, and outputs inside one work system
Preserve context for personal memory and later reuse

team.title: Teams
team.description: For teams that need shared context, coordinated roles, and less repeated handoff overhead.
bullets: Let people and agents move around the same project together
Reduce collaboration gaps through traceability and shared memory
Make automation part of the team’s operating rhythm

enterprise.title: Organizations
enterprise.description: For environments with stronger requirements around permissions, approvals, auditability, and knowledge as an asset.
bullets: Bring AI usage into explicit runtime and governance boundaries
Keep traceability, approvals, and knowledge retention in one system
Scale adoption without losing clarity or control

cta.title: You can enter at any scale without changing product logic as you grow.
cta.description: Octopus is designed so the same product thread can grow with the way work grows.

hero.title: We are not trying to build a louder AI product.
hero.description: From the start, Octopus has cared about a different question: when AI truly enters work, how should it be organized, trusted, and sustained over time instead of only looking clever in a demo.

about.principlesTitle: Four design judgments shape how the site and the product should feel.
about.principlesDescription: We want the experience to stay warm and approachable while remaining restrained enough to carry real work and more demanding organizational requirements.

calm.title: Calm
calm.description: Use restraint and order so the system feels capable of holding work instead of consuming attention.

systems.title: Systemic
systems.description: Refuse to stack isolated features. Organize around how real work actually moves.

memory.title: Memorable
memory.description: Keep knowledge and experience available so the next collaboration can begin with more context.

trust.title: Trustworthy
trust.description: Make traceability, approvals, permissions, and explanation part of the product rather than an afterthought.

journey.title: From one conversation to a system that can keep running.
journey.lead: We do not believe AI value comes only from model capability. Real value comes from whether AI can enter context, carry continuous work, remain traceable, and retain outcomes over time.
points: If AI cannot keep context, it has to restart every time.
If AI cannot move into execution, it can only advise instead of advancing work.
If AI cannot be traced and governed, it is difficult to integrate seriously into organizational systems.
If AI cannot retain experience, the value it creates cannot compound.

cta.title: Those judgments should end up in the product, not stay in the brand narrative.
cta.description: If this direction matches what you are looking for, you can go deeper into the product or book a more specific demo.

hero.title: Bring your way of working, and we can see whether Octopus fits it.
hero.description: A useful demo is not about showing more flashy features. It should help you evaluate fit around collaboration rhythm, governance needs, knowledge retention, and real operational scenarios.

summary.title: What you should expect is more than a feature tour.
summary.description: The demo should move through the following layers so you can make a faster judgment about product fit.

call.title: Book a live session
call.description: Best for team leads, project owners, or anyone who wants to evaluate rollout paths quickly.

email.title: Reach out directly
email.description: If you already have specific context, questions, or constraints, email can be the faster path.

product.title: Explore the product first
product.description: If you are still building first-pass understanding, continue with the product page before booking time.

items: Whether you are primarily solving for speed, coordination, memory, or governance
Whether AI needs to support personal work, team flow, or organization-wide operations
Whether approvals, permissions, traceability, and knowledge retention already matter in your environment
Whether you want to validate one concrete use case first or understand the full product frame

dashboard.title: Start from a work overview instead of a collection of scattered entry points.
dashboard.description: The dashboard puts workspace state, focus projects, and runtime signals into one field of view.

conversation.title: Let the conversation keep moving forward with context intact.
conversation.description: Dialogue, context panes, and runtime actions stay visible on the same surface instead of splitting apart.

knowledge.title: Let experience enter a knowledge layer instead of sinking into chat history.
knowledge.description: The knowledge surface emphasizes source, trust level, and runtime connection instead of becoming a loose asset pile.

trace.title: When execution is visible, problems and decisions are easier to understand.
trace.description: Trace makes execution paths, blockers, and approval actions legible and explicit.

governance.title: Themes, runtime, and governance belong to the system, not to an afterthought layer.
governance.description: Settings and runtime surfaces speak the same language so organizations can understand how AI enters real operating boundaries.
